info.title: Enforesight API
info.description: Regulatory enforcement intelligence platform — REST API for customer portal, admin panel, and AI chat.

bearerAuth.description: Admin endpoints: supply a JWT obtained from POST /api/admin/users/login. Customer endpoints: supply a Clerk session token.

ConversationMessage.description: A single message within an AI chat conversation

content.example: The SEC has taken 47 enforcement actions in Q1 2025...

message.example: I need help understanding the FCA sanctions

tags.name: Customer Profile
tags.description: Customer profile and session management (Clerk auth)

tags.name: Reference Data
tags.description: Countries, currencies, sectors, violation types, etc.

get.description: Returns server health status and dependency reachability. No auth required.

503.description: One or more dependencies are unhealthy

get.summary: List all available enforcement record field definitions

200.description: Array of enforcement action type objects

200.description: Content object for the given page
Content object for the given slug

post.summary: Send a message to the AI assistant
post.description:
Accepts a **Clerk session token** or an **admin JWT** in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header.
Provide `conversationId` to continue an existing conversation; omit it to start a new one.

message.description: The user's message to the AI assistant
message.example: What enforcement actions has the SEC taken against banks this year?

conversationId.description: Optional — ID of an existing conversation to continue

example.message: What enforcement actions has the SEC taken against banks this year?

message.example: The SEC has taken 47 enforcement actions against banks in 2025, totaling $2.1B in fines...

conversationId.description: ID of the conversation (new or continued)

400.description: Validation error — message field is required

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

get.summary: Get all conversations for the authenticated user
get.description: Accepts a **Clerk session token** or an **admin JWT**.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

get.summary: Get a specific conversation by ID
get.description: Requires a **Clerk session token** (not admin JWT).

delete.description: Requires a **Clerk session token** (not admin JWT).

put.summary: Update the pinned status of a conversation
put.description:
Accepts a **Clerk session token** or an **admin JWT**.
Also available at the legacy singular path `/ai/chat/conversation/{conversationId}`.

pinned.description: Set to true to pin, false to unpin

400.description: Validation error — pinned must be a boolean

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

get.summary: Get paginated message history for a conversation
get.description: Requires a **Clerk session token** (not admin JWT).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

nextCursor.description: Pass as `cursor` in the next request to fetch the previous page

get.summary: Export a full conversation as a plain-text file
get.description: Requires a **Clerk session token** (not admin JWT). Returns the conversation as a downloadable text file.

schema.example:
User: What is the SEC fine limit?
Assistant: The SEC fine limit is...

get.summary: Export a single AI message as plain text
get.description:
Accepts a **Clerk session token** or an **admin JWT**.
Also available at the legacy path `/ai/chat/message/{messageId}/export` (singular).

schema.example: The SEC announced a $450M fine against...

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

get.summary: [Legacy] Get all conversations for the authenticated user
get.description:
**Deprecated** — use `GET /ai/chat/conversations` instead.
Accepts a **Clerk session token** or an **admin JWT**.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

example: We do not sell your data

body.example: By using this service you agree to...

get.description: Public endpoint — no authentication required. Returns whichever documents are currently published.

post.description: Requires a **Clerk session token** passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

searchDescription.example: Found 12 enforcement actions in United States for the Finance sector

get.summary: Get enforcement details by ID (generates AI summary if not cached)
get.description: Public endpoint — no authentication required. An AI summary is generated and cached on first access.

200.description: Enforcement detail object with AI summary

post.description: Authenticate an admin user and receive a JWT token.

get.summary: Validate an activation code (from email link)

post.summary: Complete account activation with an activation code and new password
Resend activation email to a user
Set a new password using an activation code (same as activate)

409.description: A regulator with this name already exists

get.summary: List enforcements with optional filtering and pagination

post.summary: Create an enforcement record (multipart/form-data, optional PDF)

subjectName.description: Name of the entity subject to enforcement

enforcementActionType.description: Action type(s). Submit a single value (e.g. `Fine`) or comma-separated values (e.g. `Fine,Suspension`) — parsed server-side into an array.

violationTypes.description: Violation type(s). Submit a single value (e.g. `Market Manipulation`) or comma-separated values — parsed server-side into an array.

enforcementNoticeUrl.description: Public URL to the enforcement notice (optional if file is uploaded)

enforcementNoticeData.description: Raw text content of the enforcement notice

enforcementFile.description: PDF file upload (optional if URL is provided)

400.description: Validation error or file upload failure

post.summary: Bulk upload enforcement records from a CSV file

400.description: File upload error or invalid CSV

get.summary: Get an enforcement record by ID

patch.summary: Update an enforcement record (multipart/form-data, optional PDF)

enforcementActionType.description: Action type(s). Submit a single value (e.g. `Fine`) or comma-separated values (e.g. `Fine,Suspension`) — parsed server-side into an array.

violationTypes.description: Violation type(s). Submit a single value or comma-separated values — parsed server-side into an array.

400.description: Validation error or file upload failure
